# E5 Enclave Incorporated

> E5 Enclave Incorporated is a Miami-based 501(c)(3) public charitable organization dedicated to empowering Black communities through self-determination and economic sovereignty.

## Organization Details

- **Legal Name:** E5 Enclave Incorporated
- **Type:** 501(c)(3) Public Charitable Organization
- **Location:** Liberty City, Miami, Florida
- **Founded by:** Israel Lee Armstead, President & Chief Visionary
- **Website:** https://e5enclave.com
- **Email:** hermes@e5enclave.com | info@e5enclave.com
- **Phone:** (833) 241-7356

## Mission

Empowering Black communities through environmental sustainability, economic self-reliance, educational advancement, equality, and community building.

## The Five Pillars (The Five E's)

1. **Environmental** — Community gardens, sustainable land management, and green infrastructure
2. **Economic** — "Buying Black Blocks" to counter gentrification, Web3 and cooperative ownership models
3. **Educational** — Workshops on agriculture, financial literacy, digital skills, and entrepreneurship
4. **Equality** — Black land ownership advocacy, cultural preservation, civic engagement, and policy work
5. **Enclave** — Media, community building, and the "From The Block to the Boardroom" platform

## Programs

- [FarmBlock](https://e5enclave.com/#farmblock) — Flagship initiative integrating urban agriculture with Web3 technology, IoT sensors, FarmBot automation, and blockchain supply chain transparency
- [Clean Up to Green Up](https://e5enclave.com/#programs) — Transforming blighted lots into productive community gardens
- [Homefront Support](https://e5enclave.com/#programs) — Free home and lawn maintenance for elderly and disabled community members
- [Learn-to-Earn Hubs](https://e5enclave.com/#programs) — Digital skills training, financial literacy, and entrepreneurship education
- [Youth Leadership](https://e5enclave.com/#programs) — Summer camps, civic engagement, career exploration, and mentorship
- [Enclave Media](https://e5enclave.com/#programs) — "From The Block to the Boardroom" podcast, blog, and social media platform

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://e5enclave.com/) — Main landing page
- [About](https://e5enclave.com/#about) — Organization mission, vision, and history
- [Programs](https://e5enclave.com/#programs) — Full list of programs and initiatives
- [FarmBlock](https://e5enclave.com/#farmblock) — Flagship agriculture-technology program
- [Impact](https://e5enclave.com/#impact) — Community impact metrics and goals
- [Donate](https://e5enclave.com/#donate) — Tax-deductible donations via Zeffy
- [Contact](https://e5enclave.com/#contact) — Inquiries, volunteering, partnerships

## Impact Targets (Year 5)

- 250+ households served
- 1,000+ ambassador volunteer hours
- 150+ program trainees and participants
- 14 active block sites
- 50+ green jobs created
- 30% food security improvement target

## Motto

"Dum spiro, spero" — While I breathe, I hope
